initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    stack_ok.status,
    model.L1_model,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM model
JOIN stack_ok ON model.name = stack_ok.name AND model.version = stack_ok.version
GROUP BY stack_ok.status, model.L1_model
ORDER BY stack_ok.status ASC, occurrence_count DESC;

SELECT 
    stack_ok.status,
    model.L1_model,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM 
    model
JOIN 
    stack_ok 
    ON model.name = stack_ok.name 
    AND model.version = stack_ok.version
GROUP BY 
    stack_ok.status,
    model.L1_model
ORDER BY 
    stack_ok.status ASC,
    occurrence_count DESC;

SELECT 
    stack_ok.status,
    model.L1_model,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM 
    model
JOIN 
    stack_ok 
ON 
    model.name = stack_ok.name 
    AND model.version = stack_ok.version
GROUP BY 
    stack_ok.status,
    model.L1_model
ORDER BY 
    stack_ok.status ASC,
    occurrence_count DESC;

SELECT 
    stack_ok.status,
    model.L1_model,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM 
    model
JOIN 
    stack_ok 
    ON model.name = stack_ok.name 
    AND model.version = stack_ok.version
GROUP BY 
    stack_ok.status,
    model.L1_model
ORDER BY 
    stack_ok.status ASC,
    occurrence_count DESC;

WITH status_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        stack_ok.status,
        model.L1_model,
        COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
    FROM model
    JOIN stack_ok ON model.name = stack_ok.name AND model.version = stack_ok.version
    GROUP BY stack_ok.status, model.L1_model
),
max_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        status,
        MAX(occurrence_count) AS max_occurrence
    FROM status_counts
    GROUP BY status
)
SELECT 
    sc.status,
    sc.L1_model,
    sc.occurrence_count
FROM status_counts sc
JOIN max_counts mc ON sc.status = mc.status AND sc.occurrence_count = mc.max_occurrence
ORDER BY sc.status ASC, sc.occurrence_count DESC;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH status_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        stack_ok.status,
        model.L1_model,
        COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
    FROM model
    JOIN stack_ok ON model.name = stack_ok.name AND model.version = stack_ok.version
    GROUP BY stack_ok.status, model.L1_model
),
max_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        status,
        MAX(occurrence_count) AS max_occurrence
    FROM status_counts
    GROUP BY status
)
SELECT 
    sc.status,
    sc.L1_model,
    sc.occurrence_count
FROM status_counts sc
JOIN max_counts mc ON sc.status = mc.status AND sc.occurrence_count = mc.max_occurrence
ORDER BY sc.status ASC, sc.occurrence_count DESC;
